summary: SEV-1 UNIFIED FLOW FIX VERIFIED: Travel and Fit requests now correctly create entries in all 3 collections (admin_notifications, service_desk_tickets, channel_intakes) with matching cross-reference IDs. Notifications have read: false field for API compatibility.

TEST_01_travel_request_creates_notificat.details: POST /api/travel/request creates admin_notifications entry with read: false

TEST_02_travel_request_creates_service_d.details: POST /api/travel/request creates service_desk_tickets entry with pillar='travel'

TEST_03_travel_request_creates_channel_i.details: POST /api/travel/request creates channel_intakes entry with pillar='travel'

TEST_04_travel_cross_reference_ids_match.details: Travel notification_id, ticket_id, inbox_id all match across collections

TEST_05_fit_request_creates_notification.details: POST /api/fit/request creates admin_notifications entry with read: false

TEST_06_fit_request_creates_service_desk.details: POST /api/fit/request creates service_desk_tickets entry with pillar='fit'

TEST_07_fit_request_creates_channel_inta.details: POST /api/fit/request creates channel_intakes entry with pillar='fit'

TEST_08_fit_cross_reference_ids_match.details: Fit notification_id, ticket_id, inbox_id all match across collections

TEST_09_notifications_have_read_field.details: Unified flow notifications have 'read' field (boolean) for API compatibility

TEST_11_travel_types_endpoint.details: GET /api/travel/types returns cab, train, flight, relocation types

verified_fixes.travel_unified_flow: VERIFIED - travel_routes.py creates notification (line 278-301), ticket (line 229-275), inbox (line 305-342)
verified_fixes.fit_unified_flow: VERIFIED - fit_routes.py creates notification (line 82-113), ticket (line 116-166), inbox (line 169-207)
verified_fixes.notification_read_field: VERIFIED - Both travel and fit notifications have read: False field
verified_fixes.cross_reference_ids: VERIFIED - All 3 collections have matching notification_id, ticket_id, inbox_id

critical_code_review_comments: travel_routes.py correctly implements unified flow: notification → ticket → inbox (lines 278-343)
fit_routes.py correctly implements unified flow: notification → ticket → inbox (lines 82-207)
central_dispatcher.py provides reusable dispatch_action() function for other pillars
All entries have unified_flow_processed: true flag for tracking
seed_data_creation: Test travel and fit requests created with unique TEST-* prefixed IDs
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEV-1 unified flow fix verified. Travel and Fit requests now create entries in all 3 collections (admin_notifications, service_desk_tickets, channel_intakes). The central_dispatcher.py module provides a reusable dispatch_action() function that other pillars can use to ensure unified flow compliance.
api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/travel/request - Creates travel request with unified flow (notification + ticket + inbox)
POST /api/fit/request - Creates fit request with unified flow (notification + ticket + inbox)
